feedback.text: I have read what I write in this initial initiative and I do not agree with most things, but I do not think it is enough. I need the law to also keep the protection of games bought by the consumer, that when you buy that game, I would be able to do so without the developer or somebody else deciding whether the game is to be played or not. I do not want to pay for a game that I don’t need to do. He will not be able to play a big game, so that the developer, or a company like VISA or Mastercard, decide whether the game can be played in the future. We do not need to do so, but I do not think they need to do so.
